message:
feat: Add --draft flag for CPU-based speculative decoding

- Add --draft <model.gguf> CLI flag to specify draft model
- Draft model runs on CPU (n_gpu_layers=0) to avoid memory bus contention
- Target model runs on GPU with SSD prefetch
- Pass model_path to scheduler for madvise(WILLNEED) prefetch

Also fix Zig 0.15 compatibility:
- callconv(.C) → callconv(.c)
- empty_sigset → sigemptyset()
- Remove try from void sigaction
